arts.ttl: 'I think': Alan Shearer makes claim about Lewis Hall at Newcastle that Gary Lineker immediately agrees with
arts.sum: In the summer, Lewis Hall’s switch from Chelsea to Newcastle United became a permanent deal, a player who didn’t feature too often under Eddie Howe...

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle welcome Wolves to St James’ Park this evening looking to continue their brilliant run of form. Eddie Howe’s side are seeking a ninth straight win in all competitions. The Magpies overcame fourth-tier Bromley to progress in the FA Cup at the weekend and are also in pole position to reach the Carabao Cup final. […] The post Newcastle vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe's solution to toughest Newcastle decision as new undroppable emerges
arts.sum: For perhaps the first time since he arrived at the club, Howe has a huge dilemma over who to pick in the centre of his Newcastle United defence for tonight's game against Wolves - and in the remainder of the campaign. However, Fabian Schar is back from suspension, having hit top form again this season, while Dan Burn has been imperious alongside him in the heart of the United backline.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United to receive £73m PSR boost with exciting transfer plans set to return
arts.sum: With recent reports suggesting Newcastle could make around £7m profit for the aforementioned 23/24 period, that, in theory, would allow the club to post an £84m loss in the current financial year and still fall within the £105m PSR limit. That is because come July 1, when the new PSR period starts, Howe's side will have the £73m loss of 2021/22 wiped away from the three-year accounting balance sheets, leaving only the £73m loss from 2022/23 and the potential profit made in 2023/24.

arts.ttl: Wednesday PL Predictions: Cunha to help end Toon run
arts.sum: Our betting expert Jones Knows nailed four correct results from four on Tuesday and landed his 2/1 best bet. What's on his radar this evening?

arts.ttl: Newcastle fans stunned by how well the Nottingham Forest player they sold for just £3.5m performed vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Newcastle United fans watched on as three of their former players really impressed in Nottingham Forest’s 1-1 draw with Liverpool. Forest managed to hold Liverpool...

arts.ttl: Newcastle United learn Stefanos Tzimas transfer stance ahead of €25m summer battle
arts.sum: Tzimas scored five goals to help PAOK win the Greek Super League last season before moving to Nurnberg on loan last June. However, it is thought Nurnberg will look to sell the striker on in the summer, prompting interest from Premier League sides.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United drop new stadium hint after 2025 spending spree question
arts.sum: When asked if he dreamed of the day that Newcastle can get more use out of the Saudi millions in the background at St James' Park, Howe pointed to the club's off-field operations team on the ground on Tyneside. When asked if Newcastle could repeat the Anderson sale and sell an up and coming star like Lewis Miley, Howe replied: "The last thing we want to do, or I want to do as the manager of the club, is to sell academy products who have the potential to play for this team for many years.

arts.ttl: The stunning transformation of Alexander Isak from shy teenager to ruthless goalscorer
arts.sum: The Newcastle striker and Sweden international initially struggled at Borussia Dortmund after leaving hometown club AIK before growing into one of the best goalscorers in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's strong 'waste of energy' response after Carragher, Sutton and Sherwood claims
arts.sum: There is a lot of football left to play, of course, in the second half of the campaign but Newcastle's form has been such that Jamie Carragher has backed the Magpies to finish in fifth place in his revised season predictions after the Liverpool legend previously claimed that Howe's team would not be a European contender. Newcastle, in the process, have closed the gap on fourth-placed Chelsea and the Magpies could leapfrog the Blues in the table with a win against Wolves tonight.
